codeReview.summary: Commit 83c9d237255cc46b5b665102e286613e0f6e012f satisfies the feature contract. Runtime support is present in core/src/lib.rs where RepoForeignPersistence.ensure_at routes explicit-id foreign persistence through Repo::<T>::upsert_at so foreign children inherit the same first-write table bootstrap semantics as root saves, and the commit adds a focused schemaless regression proving a fresh no-schema parent save auto-creates the foreign child table, stores a RecordId reference at rest, and hydrates correctly on get().

sharedStateObservations.observation: The commit that implements this feature also bundled unrelated hydrate-roundtrip scrutiny artifact additions/deletions under .factory/validation, but .factory/services.yaml documents only cargo validation commands and does not capture any convention for isolating mission-artifact staging from code feature commits.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: git show --stat 83c9d237255cc46b5b665102e286613e0f6e012f shows the intended code/test change in core/tests/integration_db.rs plus 11 unrelated .factory/validation/hydrate-roundtrip and save-atomicity review artifact edits.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission traceability for this completed feature is incomplete: the assigned worker session has no handoff file and no worker-transcripts.jsonl entry, so scrutiny could not verify the rust-library-worker fail-first procedure directly and had to rely on landed diff plus existing review evidence.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: features.json marks completedWorkerSessionId as 8a552dd5-f5e9-4310-859a-cbe2ecd9e3f2 for milestone-c-store-schemaless-bootstrap, but mission handoffs contain no filename with that session id and Grep over worker-transcripts.jsonl finds no matching entry.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the feature metadata, available prior scrutiny evidence, commit 83c9d237255cc46b5b665102e286613e0f6e012f, the runtime foreign bootstrap seam, and the focused regression in core/tests/integration_db.rs. The feature correctly makes schemaless foreign child bootstrap a Store-wide save contract and I found no blocking or non-blocking code defects within this feature scope.
